name: VectorBT
pricing_notes: Open source core (BSL 1.1 for vectorbt pro); vectorbt free on GitHub

performance.notes: Numba-accelerated backtesting; orders of magnitude faster than loop-based backtesting libraries

agent_readiness.notes: Ultra-fast vectorized backtesting library using Numba. Test thousands of parameter combinations simultaneously. Portfolio simulation, performance metrics, drawdown analysis. Integrates with pandas/numpy. Plotly-based interactive charts. Supports custom signal generation. Particularly good for technical indicator strategy testing across multiple assets. vectorbt pro adds more features.

gotchas: Non-standard API — steep learning curve compared to backtrader
BSL license for vectorbt pro is not fully open source
Vectorized approach makes some complex order logic difficult
best_when: Hyperparameter grid search for trading strategies (test 10,000+ combinations fast)
avoid_when: Event-driven backtesting with complex order logic (use backtrader)
summary: VectorBT is an ultra-fast vectorized backtesting library using Numba acceleration. Tests thousands of strategy parameter combinations simultaneously — orders of magnitude faster than loop-based alternatives. Portfolio simulation, performance metrics, and interactive Plotly charts. Best for quantitative researchers doing rapid iteration over large strategy parameter spaces.
